text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 15 

BHVRL_HLTH_SCL_SRVC_TXNMY_IND 

LABEL: Behavioral Health-Social Service Provider Taxonomy Indicator — Ever in Calendar Year 

DESCRIPTION: Indicates whether the provider’s taxonomy value maps to the behavioral health and social service 
provider category; ever in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: BHVRL_HLTH_SCL_SRVC_TXNMY_IND 

LONG NAME: BHVRL_HLTH_SCL_SRVC_TXNMY_IND
